mapper.select: SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, PRE_WEIGHT, VOLUME_TON FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} UNION SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, PRE_WEIGHT, VOLUME_TON FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SCN, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_ID, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_CODE, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, TBCI.PACKING_CODE, TBCI.PACKING_NAME, TBCI.COMPANY_ID, TBCI.COMPANY_NAME, TBCI.PARENT_ID, TBCI.ROOT_ID, TBCI.QUANTITY, TBCI.TON, TBCI.RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.IS_CLEAR, TBCI.CLEAR_BY, TBCI.CLEAR_BY_NAME, TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.CREATE_BY, TBCI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.CREATE_TIME, TBCI.UPDATE_BY, TBCI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.UPDATE_TIME, TBCI.SOURCE, TBCI.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, TBCI.STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TBCI.TRUST_ID, TBCI.CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, TBCI.CONTRACT_CODE, TBCI.VOYAGE, TBCI.STORAGE_DATE, TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE, TBCI.ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TBCI.SCN, TBCI.SHIP_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_ID, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_CODE, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, TBCI.PACKING_CODE, TBCI.PACKING_NAME, TBCI.COMPANY_ID, TBCI.COMPANY_NAME, TBCI.PARENT_ID, TBCI.ROOT_ID, TBCI.QUANTITY, TBCI.TON, TBCI.RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, TBCI.IS_CLEAR, TBCI.CLEAR_BY, TBCI.CLEAR_BY_NAME, TBCI.CLEAR_DATE, TBCI.CREATE_BY, TBCI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.CREATE_TIME, TBCI.UPDATE_BY, TBCI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBCI.UPDATE_TIME, TBCI.SOURCE, TBCI.STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, TBCI.STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TBCI.TRUST_ID, TBCI.CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, TBCI.CONTRACT_CODE, TBCI.VOYAGE, TBCI.STORAGE_DATE, TBCI.RESIDUE_STORAGE, TBCI.TRANSFER_DATE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN (SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH ON TBCI.ID = TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBH.ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE, TRANSFER_DATE, ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE, STORAGE_DATE, RESIDUE_STORAGE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TBCMR.MIX_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') "mixDate", SUM(TBCMD.MIX_WEIGHT) "mixWeight" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_RECORD TBCMR JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_MIX_DETAIL TBCMD ON TBCMR.ID = TBCMD.MIX_RECORD_ID WHERE TBCMD.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(TBCMR.MIX_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CONTACT_NO "CONTRACT_NO", TBCR.ID "CONTRACT_RATE_ID", TBCR.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TBCR.RATE, TBCR.TAX, SFB.FILE_ID FROM (SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, PRE_WEIGHT, VOLUME_TON, CHARGE_STATUS FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, PRE_WEIGHT, VOLUME_TON, CHARGE_STATUS FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT) WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) TEMP ON TBCI.ID = TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_COMPANY TBCC ON TBCI.COMPANY_ID = TBCC.COMPANY_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON (TBC.STATUS = '20' AND TBCC.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID AND TBH.CARGO_OWNER_ID = TBC.CUSTOMER_ID AND
#{date} >= TBC.START_TIME AND #{date} <= TBC.END_TIME
TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' THEN TDS.BERTH_TIME ELSE TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT END, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= TBC.START_TIME AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' THEN TDS.BERTH_TIME ELSE TEMP.WEIGH_OUT_DT END, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') <= TBC.END_TIME
) JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBCR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = 'MS00240' AND TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TBH.CARGO_CODE = TBCR.CARGO_CODE) LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TBC.ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID WHERE TBH.ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TBC.CREATE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE (ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, RATE, TAX, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_BY_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_USE_REDUCE) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoOwnerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractRateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{freeStorageDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reviewByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewByTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isUseReduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL(ID, STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, "DATE", TON, BILLABLE_TON, IN_TON, OUT_TON, AMOUNT,TAX_AMOUNT) VALUES (#{detail.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.storageSettleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{detail.date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{detail.ton,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.billableTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.inTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.outTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{detail.taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL});

mapper.select: SELECT TCSS.ID TCSS_ID, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCSS.COMPANY_ID TCSS_COMPANY_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_NAME TCSS_COMPANY_NAME, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_ID TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_NAME TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID TCSS_CARGO_INFO_ID, TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID TCSS_HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_RATE_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TCSS.RATE TCSS_RATE, TCSS.TAX TCSS_TAX, TCSS.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TCSS_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TCSS.AMOUNT TCSS_AMOUNT, TCSS.TAX_AMOUNT TCSS_TAX_AMOUNT, TCSS.START_DATE TCSS_START_DATE, TCSS.END_DATE TCSS_END_DATE, TCSS.STATUS TCSS_STATUS, TCSS.REVIEW_BY TCSS_REVIEW_BY, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_NAME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_TIME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_TIME, TCSS.CREATE_BY TCSS_CREATE_BY, TCSS.CREATE_BY_NAME TCSS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.CREATE_TIME TCSS_CREATE_TIME, TCSS.UPDATE_BY TCSS_UPDATE_BY, TCSS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TCSS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.UPDATE_TIME TCSS_UPDATE_TIME, TCSS.IS_USE_REDUCE TCSS_IS_USE_REDUCE, TCSSD.ID TCSSD_ID, TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID TCSSD_STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, TCSSD."DATE" TCSSD_DATE, TCSSD.TON TCSSD_TON, TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON TCSSD_BILLABLE_TON, TCSSD.IN_TON TCSSD_IN_TON, TCSSD.OUT_TON TCSSD_OUT_TON, TCSSD.AMOUNT TCSSD_AMOUNT, TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT TCSSD_TAX_AMOUNT, TBC.CONTACT_NO CONTRACT_NO, DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '1', TCS.STATUS) "statementStatus", DECODE(TCSS.STATUS, '10', '已结算', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '30', '计费审核', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '31', '商务确认', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '40', '部分开票', DECODE(TCS.STATUS, '50', '已开票', ''))))) "statementStatusLabel" FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TCSS.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSD.BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID WHERE TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TCSS.CREATE_TIME DESC, TCSSD."DATE"

SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_DAYS, RATE, TAX, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TYPE, RATE_ID, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TRATE_ITEM_ID, TRATE_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE WHERE ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TCSS.ID TCSS_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_ID TCSS_COMPANY_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_NAME TCSS_COMPANY_NAME, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_ID TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_NAME TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID TCSS_CARGO_INFO_ID, TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID TCSS_HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_RATE_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TCSS.RATE TCSS_RATE, TCSS.TAX TCSS_TAX, TCSS.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TCSS_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TCSS.AMOUNT TCSS_AMOUNT, TCSS.TAX_AMOUNT TCSS_TAX_AMOUNT, TCSS.START_DATE TCSS_START_DATE, TCSS.END_DATE TCSS_END_DATE, TCSS.STATUS TCSS_STATUS, TCSS.REVIEW_BY TCSS_REVIEW_BY, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_NAME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_TIME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_TIME, TCSS.CREATE_BY TCSS_CREATE_BY, TCSS.CREATE_BY_NAME TCSS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.CREATE_TIME TCSS_CREATE_TIME, TCSS.UPDATE_BY TCSS_UPDATE_BY, TCSS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TCSS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.UPDATE_TIME TCSS_UPDATE_TIME, TCSS.IS_USE_REDUCE TCSS_IS_USE_REDUCE, TCSSD.ID TCSSD_ID, TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID TCSSD_STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, TCSSD."DATE" TCSSD_DATE, TCSSD.TON TCSSD_TON, TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON TCSSD_BILLABLE_TON, TCSSD.IN_TON TCSSD_IN_TON, TCSSD.OUT_TON TCSSD_OUT_TON, TCSSD.AMOUNT TCSSD_AMOUNT, TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT TCSSD_TAX_AMOUNT FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID WHERE TCSS.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT (ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL, STATEMENT_BY, STATEMENT_BY_NAME, STATEMENT_TIME, REVIEW_BY, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_TIME, CONFIRM_BY, CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CONFIRM_TIME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TAX_INVOICE_NAME, RECEIPT_REMARK) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statementByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reviewBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reviewByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{confirmBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{confirmByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{settlementBasisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementBasisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInvoiceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiptRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, INVOICE_NUMBER, INVOICE_AMOUNT, BUSINESS_ID, RATE_ID, IS_DERIVED, TRATE_ITEM_ID, PREFERENTIAL_RATE, NUMBER2, TRATE_ID) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statement,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{number,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{invoiceNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{invoiceAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{businessId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isDerived,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trateItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{preferentialRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{number2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{trateId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.select: SELECT TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL, TCS.STATEMENT_BY, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_TIME, TCS.REVIEW_BY, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_TIME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, TCS.RECEIPT_REMARK FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT WHERE TCS.TYPE = '50' AND TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = #{storageSettleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL, TCS.STATEMENT_BY, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_TIME, TCS.REVIEW_BY, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_TIME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, TCS.RECEIPT_REMARK
mapper.delete: UPDATE T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REVIEW_BY = NULL, REVIEW_BY_NAME = NULL, REVIEW_BY_TIME = NULL WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT TCSS.ID TCSS_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_ID TCSS_COMPANY_ID, TCSS.COMPANY_NAME TCSS_COMPANY_NAME, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCSS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID TCSS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_ID TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_ID, TCSS.CARGO_OWNER_NAME TCSS_CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TCSS.CARGO_INFO_ID TCSS_CARGO_INFO_ID, TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID TCSS_HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_ID, TCSS.CONTRACT_RATE_ID TCSS_CONTRACT_RATE_ID, TCSS.RATE TCSS_RATE, TCSS.TAX TCSS_TAX, TCSS.FREE_STORAGE_DAYS TCSS_FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, TCSS.AMOUNT TCSS_AMOUNT, TCSS.TAX_AMOUNT TCSS_TAX_AMOUNT, TCSS.START_DATE TCSS_START_DATE, TCSS.END_DATE TCSS_END_DATE, TCSS.STATUS TCSS_STATUS, TCSS.REVIEW_BY TCSS_REVIEW_BY, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_NAME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCSS.REVIEW_BY_TIME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_TIME, TCSS.CREATE_BY TCSS_CREATE_BY, TCSS.CREATE_BY_NAME TCSS_CREATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.CREATE_TIME TCSS_CREATE_TIME, TCSS.UPDATE_BY TCSS_UPDATE_BY, TCSS.UPDATE_BY_NAME TCSS_UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCSS.UPDATE_TIME TCSS_UPDATE_TIME, TCSS.IS_USE_REDUCE TCSS_IS_USE_REDUCE, TCSSD.ID TCSSD_ID, TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID TCSSD_STORAGE_SETTLE_ID, TCSSD."DATE" TCSSD_DATE, TCSSD.TON TCSSD_TON, TCSSD.BILLABLE_TON TCSSD_BILLABLE_TON, TCSSD.IN_TON TCSSD_IN_TON, TCSSD.OUT_TON TCSSD_OUT_TON, TCSSD.AMOUNT TCSSD_AMOUNT, TCSSD.TAX_AMOUNT TCSSD_TAX_AMOUNT, TBC.CONTACT_NO CONTRACT_NO, T0.ID "statementId", T0.status "statementStatus", T0.STATEMENT_BY_NAME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_NAME, T0.REVIEW_BY_NAME TCSS_REVIEW_BY_NAME, T0.CONFIRM_BY_NAME TCSS_CONFIRM_BY_NAME, T0.STATEMENT_NO FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS JOIN T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE_DETAIL TCSSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSSD.STORAGE_SETTLE_ID JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TCSS.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID left JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL T1 ON T1.BUSINESS_ID = TCSS.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT T0 ON T1.STATEMENT = T0.ID WHERE T0.ID IS NOT NULL AND TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY TCSS.CREATE_TIME DESC, TCSSD."DATE"

SELECT TCS.ID, TCS.COMPANY_ID, TCS.COMPANY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_NO, TCS.CUSTOMER_ID, TCS.CUSTOMER_NAME, TCS.TYPE, TCS.TRUST_ID, TCS.TRUST_CARGO_ID, TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TCS.CARGO_CODE, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TCS.TRADE_TYPE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_DATE, TCS.STATUS, TCS.REMARK, TCS.CREATE_BY, TCS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME, TCS.UPDATE_BY, TCS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TCS.UPDATE_TIME, TCS.IS_FINAL, TCS.STATEMENT_BY, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_TIME, TCS.REVIEW_BY, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_TIME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_CODE, TCS.TAX_INVOICE_NAME, TCS.RECEIPT_REMARK FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCS WHERE TCS.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT '库场使用费' FEE_NAME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, TCSD.AMOUNT AMOUNT, TCSD."NUMBER" "number", TCSD.RATE RATE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME REVIEW_NAME, TCS.CREATE_TIME REVIEW_TIME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME STATEMENT_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME CONFIRM_NAME
FROM T_COST_STORAGE_SETTLE TCSS LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TCSS.CONTRACT_ID = TBC.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCSS.ID = TCSD.BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCSD.STATEMENT = TCS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID
TCS.ID IS NOT NULL AND TCS.TYPE = '50' AND TCSS.HANDOVERLIST_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT CASE WHEN to_char(TCSD.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME) IS NULL THEN '包干费' ELSE '包干费' || '(' || to_char(SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME) || ')' END FEE_NAME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, TCSD.AMOUNT AMOUNT, TCSD."NUMBER" "number", TCSD.RATE RATE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME REVIEW_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME STATEMENT_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME CONFIRM_NAME, TCS.REVIEW_TIME REVIEW_TIME
FROM (SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.HANDOVERLIST_ID = TBH.ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TBC.ID = TCSD.CONTRACT_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID
TCS.ID IS NOT NULL AND TCS.TYPE IN ('10','20') AND TBH.ID IN
#{id}

SELECT TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME FEE_NAME, TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, CASE WHEN to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) IS NULL THEN to_char(TBCI.CARGO_NAME) ELSE to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) END CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, SUM(TCSD.AMOUNT) AMOUNT, SUM(TCSD."NUMBER") "number", MAX(TCSD.RATE) RATE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME REVIEW_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME STATEMENT_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME CONFIRM_NAME
FROM T_MISC_BILLING TMB LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.ID = TMB.STATEMENT_ID LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC ON TBC.ID = TCSD.CONTRACT_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_RATE TBR ON TBR.ID = TCSD.RATE_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.ID = TMB.CARGO_INFO_ID
TCS.ID IS NOT NULL AND TMB.CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{id}
GROUP BY TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME , TCS.SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, TCS.CARGO_NAME, TBC.CONTACT_NO, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE, TCS.REVIEW_BY_NAME, TCS.STATEMENT_BY_NAME, TCS.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CASE WHEN to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) IS NULL THEN to_char(TBCI.CARGO_NAME) ELSE to_char(TCS.CARGO_NAME) END

SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, REDUCE_TYPE, REDUCE_DAYS, REDUCE_END_DATE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_STACK_FEE_REDUCE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
